queries.q: Write up the results of the checkout button A/B test that hit significance yesterday
Our onboarding experiment ended early because of a guardrail breach. Document what happened and what we learned.
The paywall test finished: treatment up 4.2% on conversion, p=0.03. Turn this into a readout for stakeholders who weren't involved.
Summarize the pricing page experiment outcome with confidence intervals and a ship, iterate, or kill recommendation
We ran the email cadence test for six weeks. Analyze the primary and guardrail metrics and tell the org what we found.
Document the experiment readout for the recommendation widget, including segment breakdowns by platform and tenure
The dark mode test came back flat. Write an honest results doc so we stop relitigating it.
Turn the raw numbers from the search ranking test into a findings document with learnings that go beyond the stats
Leadership wants to know if the free trial extension experiment worked. Put together the results with the statistics and a clear recommendation.
Our growth experiment on referral incentives just concluded. Capture the outcome so future teams can learn from it.
Design an A/B test for the new paywall: hypothesis, variants, sample size, and how long it needs to run
queries.notes: Experiment not run yet; design comes before results

queries.q: The experiment data is in and it is bleak. Should we change direction on the freemium strategy or stay the course? Lay out the options and decide.
queries.notes: Direction decision attached; results skill reports, pivot skill decides

queries.q: Analyze the 600 responses from our churn survey and summarize the drivers
queries.notes: Survey responses, not a controlled experiment

queries.q: Spec the tracking events we need in place before the experiment launches next sprint
My significance calculator script throws a divide-by-zero error, can you fix it?
We want to test three subject-line variants next month. What metrics, guardrails, and stopping rules should the experiment have?
queries.notes: Future experiment setup, not a completed readout

queries.q: Add the transferable lessons from our last five experiments to the team's knowledge base
queries.notes: Banking organizational learnings, not a single experiment readout

queries.q: Build the dashboard requirements for ongoing experiment program health
Translate this results document into French for the Paris office
Write a testable hypothesis with success metrics for the new activation idea before we build anything
